text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 
37 
MDCD_MC_MEDICAL_MOS 
LABEL: 
Medicaid — Managed Care Medicaid Coverage Months 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the number of months during the year when the beneficiary had Medicaid managed 
care medical coverage. 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS DE file (derived) 
VALUES: 
0–12, or null/missing (if no Medicaid enrollment) 
COMMENT: 
CCW calculates this variable using the DE file. We consider the beneficiary to
